nyc.label: New York City
nyc.today_detail: Rain showers likely before 8am, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy. High near 63, with temperatures falling to around 61 in the afternoon. Southwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

miami.label: Miami
miami.today_forecast: Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
miami.today_detail: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 2pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 90. Northwest wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
miami.tonight_forecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Clear
